source_pr.title: log-backup: Refactor daemon
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #36762 

Problem Summary:

See the issue.

### What is changed and how it works?

The `AdvancerDaemon` has been refactored, now, it would be carried by a new type `OwnerDaemon`, which supports the callback `OnBegin`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: +// This struct is "synchronous" (which means there are no race accessing of these variables.).
failure_signature: +// This struct is "synchronous" (which means there are no race accessing of these variables.).
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Global state must be reset/restored between tests. This PR stabilizes it by: log-backup: Refactor daemon.

evidence: evidence: +// This struct is "synchronous" (which means there are no race accessing of these variables.).
